reviews.comment:
Creo que es la peor estación de servicio que conozco. Una vergüenza la infraestructura, lleno de moscas en el interior de shop, en el baño de hombre todo los pisos peinados,  imposible entrar del olor a orina. Creo que debe hacer días que no se limpian. Pedía un café para llevar, no tiene tapa. El playero desparramado en un mesa comiendo pan casero, la empleado del shop, limpia la mesa con la mano.
La verdad que el ACA, debería supervisar las estaciones.

(Translated by Google)
I think it's the worst gas station I know. The infrastructure is a disgrace, the convenience store is full of flies, and the men's restroom floor is practically combed; it's impossible to go in because of the smell of urine. I think it must have been days since it was cleaned. I ordered a coffee to go, and it didn't have a lid. The attendant was sprawled on a table eating homemade bread, and the convenience store employee was wiping the table with her bare hand. Honestly, the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) should be supervising gas stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5aVlHYzdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargamos combustible y luego consumimos en el bar. Lo malo fue que no reciben la aplicación de YPF en el bar. Y por último el baño no tiene cambiador para niños.

(Translated by Google)
We filled up with gas and then had something to eat at the bar. The downside was that they don't accept the YPF app at the bar. And lastly, the bathroom doesn't have a baby changing table.
